name: Cottage Tuna Noodle
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions until tender.
2. Drain the cooked noodles.
3. Add onion, salt, pepper, cottage cheese, sour cream, and water to the drained noodles. Mix well.
4. Stir in the tuna.
5. Transfer mixture to a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle Romano cheese over the top.
7. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until bubbly.
8. Serve hot. Makes 6-8 servings, each about 3/4 cup.
